title: rondeletia poitaei
intro: Rondeletia poitaei, also known as the Poisonwood or Poison-Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, due to its rich content of bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Rondeletia poitaei is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
